name: PM Vibe Agent Run
persona: A PM at a 30–300 person B2B SaaS company who must make fast trade-offs in weekly prioritization or escalation reviews without an analyst to sanity-check decision coherence
problem_statement: PMs often make time-boxed calls under conflicting stakeholder pressure, and the reasoning collapses in review because the chosen action contradicts the constraints they claimed to be operating under
artifact_type: single-page web app decision simulator with timed run + rubric-based grading
